title: chrysosplenium zhouzhiense
intro: Chrysosplenium zhouzhiense, also known as Zhouzhi spleenwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium zhouzhiense include lowering blood sugar levels, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of fever and sore throats. In herbal preparations, Chrysosplenium zhouzhiense can be taken as a decoction, with the dried whole plant or roots being boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
